title: Clinical Data Managers
description: Apply knowledge of health care and database management to analyze clinical data, and to identify and report trends.

tasks.text: Design and validate clinical databases, including designing or testing logic checks.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Process clinical data, including receipt, entry, verification, or filing of information.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Generate data queries, based on validation checks or errors and omissions identified during data entry, to resolve identified problems.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Develop project-specific data management plans that address areas such as coding, reporting, or transfer of data, database locks, and work flow processes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Monitor work productivity or quality to ensure compliance with standard operating procedures.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Prepare appropriate formatting to data sets as requested.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Design forms for receiving, processing, or tracking data.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare data analysis listings and activity, performance, or progress reports.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Confer with end users to define or implement clinical system requirements such as data release formats, delivery schedules, and testing protocols.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Perform quality control audits to ensure accuracy, completeness, or proper usage of clinical systems and data.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Analyze clinical data using appropriate statistical tools.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Evaluate processes and technologies, and suggest revisions to increase productivity and efficiency.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Develop technical specifications for data management programming and communicate needs to information technology staff.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Write work instruction manuals, data capture guidelines, or standard operating procedures.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Track the flow of work forms, including in-house data flow or electronic forms transfer.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Supervise the work of data management project staff.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Contribute to the compilation, organization, and production of protocols, clinical study reports, regulatory submissions, or other controlled documentation.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Read technical literature and participate in continuing education or professional associations to maintain awareness of current database technology and best practices.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Train staff on technical procedures or software program usage.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Develop or select specific software programs for various research scenarios.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide support and information to functional areas such as marketing, clinical monitoring, and medical affairs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
